label: Critical Need
desc: Every 2 seconds, someone in the world needs a life-saving blood transfusion.

label: Impact Factor
desc: A single donation of one pint of blood can save up to three people's lives.

label: Daily Gap
desc: About 38,000 blood donations are needed every single day to meet hospital demands.

label: Eligibility
desc: Only 38% of the population is eligible to donate, but less than 10% actually do.
